{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220852422C947A0A4FD6C184AE78"}"},"total":30},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7256313270188753719","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看推荐五星，看的我是非常的喜欢，刘关张等蜀国君臣尤其是军师三人早早现身了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689492196,"group_id":"7242625280542510120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"如果有好看的书可以推荐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8yELGAhzvvT8D579LLSihsN4gWJ/MPpSomhPyVg9Shl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e1dad66f876c4efcabbe1e44bef9236f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705173&x-signature=voyGWgGOAe0tBAzfFW6rb2sB2zU%3D","user_id":"4073027998847427","user_name":"斩神苏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4073027998847427","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1684756336,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7242625280542510120","book_info":{"abstract":"【国运+直播+历史名人+召唤】
林汐意外穿越，却发现这里在进行赌上国家的国运战。
历史名人将复苏，各国武将谋士同台竞技，胜者，获得国运基石与土地，败者，则失去一切。
但，华夏历史却不知为何发生了异变，猛将谋士被历史所掩埋，无人知晓。
大名战神朱祁镇再次留学！
虚构演义与史实相结合，乃至于可以召唤出“无双上将邢道荣”这路货色！
华夏一路败退，一路丢失土地与国运基石。
如今，只剩下最后一块国运基石。无人想成为敌国阶下囚，但国运基石早已绑定。本来，林汐完全可以跟随这潮流，接受这一切......
如果华夏历史和虚构演义相结合，将会是最强的存在，却因为无人知晓那些历史，无人知晓那些民间故事，现在要因为国运战输掉而灭国？
他不服！怎么可能接受！！！
如果无人记得，那就由他来重现！
“呵呵，虽然不知道是谁做的这一切，但还是多谢了，将虚构演义与史实相结合，你可真是个大聪明！”
*本故事纯属虚构，历史名人非史实，为民间版本和历史版本融合*","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obd70423c0799cf657f942f9e97b569fa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青黄不接绿","author_id":"","book_id":"7242625280542510120","book_name":"国运直播：只有我知道华夏历史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7242625284342874680","read_count":"101","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"234361"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"101","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2obd70423c0799cf657f942f9e97b569fa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779324762&x-signature=FnL97mTz3oS2gQ8mtvqAl0Recqo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2397358477818957","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6421245e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220852422C947A0A4FD6C184AE78"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_coun _id":"7242625280542510120","book_info":{"abstract":"【国运+直播+历史名人+召唤】
林汐意外穿越，却发现这里在进行赌上国家的国运战。
历史名人将复苏，各国武将谋士同台竞技，胜者，获得国运基石与土地，败者，则失去一切。
但，华夏历史却不知为何发生了异变，猛将谋士被历史所掩埋，无人知晓。
大名战神朱祁镇再次留学！
虚构演义与史实相结合，乃至于可以召唤出“无双上将邢道荣”这路货色！
华夏一路败退，一路丢失土地与国运基石。
如今，只剩下最后一块国运基石。无人想成为敌国阶下囚，但国运基石早已绑定。本来，林汐完全可以跟随这潮流，接受这一切......
如果华夏历史和虚构演义相结合，将会是最强的存在，却因为无人知晓那些历史，无人知晓那些民间故事，现在要因为国运战输掉而灭国？
他不服！怎么可能接受！！！
如果无人记得，那就由他来重现！
“呵呵，虽然不知道是谁做的这一切，但还是多谢了，将虚构演义与史实相结合，你可真是个大聪明！”
